<table class="navbox">
<tr><th colspan="2" class="navbox-title">[[:Category:Traveler's Gate|Traveler's Gate]]</th></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Books</th><td class="navbox-data">[[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]] • [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]] • [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Magic</th><td class="navbox-data">[[Traveling and the Territories]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Browse</th><td class="navbox-data">[[:Category:Traveler's Gate characters|Characters]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate locations|Locations]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate groups|Groups]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate events|Events]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate|Everything]]</td></tr>
</table>
